news.headline: Netflix gains 5M subscribers, boosting revenue to $9.8B in the quarter - a 15% increase from last year.
news.summary: The latest enhancements contributed to a surge in revenue, reaching $9.8 billion in the current period, reflecting a substantial 15% rise compared to the corresponding period the previous year.

news.headline: Compound feeds market set to grow to $636 billion by 2029 at a 3.8% CAGR, up from $526.6 billion in 2024, driven by demand for animal nutrition.
news.summary: A recent study by BCC Research projects a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.8%, indicating market expansion from $526.6 billion in 2024 to $636.0 billion by 2029. The surge is attributed to increasing interest in premium animal nutrition and feed supplements. The report highlights Boston, and emphasizes that compound feeds, which are tailored nutrient mixtures, play a crucial role in catering to animal dietary needs.

news.headline: Discover local artwork at markets and galleries across North Dakota this fall. Beauty beyond badlands. Date: Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: This autumn in North Dakota, residents and visitors have the opportunity to discover the talent of local artists and makers at various markets and galleries. With the arrival of fall on October 17, 2024, in Bismarck, individuals can immerse themselves in the diverse creations showcased across the state. From paintings and sculptures to handmade goods, there is a range of artistic expressions waiting to be explored. Beyond the picturesque landscapes, the artistic community in North Dakota adds to the beauty of the season. Explore these unique works as a total of #number markets and galleries across the state open their doors to showcase the creativity and craftsmanship of local talent. Enjoy the fusion of artistic expression and autumnal beauty during this time in North Dakota.

news.headline: Dow reaches new record close amid positive economic data, suggesting a smooth landing ahead.

news.summary: Scheduled call on Tuesday, October 29, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. EST.

news.headline: Anika Therapeutics to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 31, 2024, followed by conference call at 8:30am ET.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Anika Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANIK), a leading global company focused on joint preservation in early intervention orthopedics, revealed plans to release its third quarter financial results on Thursday, October 31, 2024. The results will be made public before the market opens, followed by a conference call scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the results and key business achievements.

news.headline: Freehold Royalties announces dividend of Cdn. $0.09/share, payable on Nov. 15, 2024, to shareholders on record on Oct. 31.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on October 17, 2024, Freehold Royalties Ltd. (Freehold) (TSX: FRU) has declared a dividend of Cdn. $0.09 per common share. This dividend will be disbursed on November 15, 2024, to shareholders listed on record as of October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Marten Transport's Q3 2024 net income is $3.8M (5 cents/share), down from $13.6M (17 cents/share) in Q3 2023. Nine-month period net income is $21.3M (26 cents/share) in 2024, down from $58.0M (71 cents/share) in 2023.
news.summary: In Mondovi, Wisconsin, on October 17, 2024, Marten Transport, Ltd. (Nasdaq/GS:MRTN) released their financial results. In this quarter ending on September 30, 2024, the company reported a net income of $3.8 million, equivalent to 5 cents per diluted share. This shows a decline from the third quarter of 2023, where the net income was $13.6 million, or 17 cents per diluted share. Looking at the nine months leading up to September 30, 2024, the company's net income was $21.3 million (26 cents per diluted share). In comparison, the same period in 2023 saw a higher net income of $58.0 million, with 71 cents per diluted share.

news.headline: TPI Composites to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time).
news.summary: Scottsdale, Arizona-based TPI Composites, Inc. stated that it will disclose its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, post-market closure. This announcement will be succeeded by a conference call scheduled for 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day. TPI, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TPIC, is preparing to share its performance data with stakeholders, investors, and the public regarding its operations and financial standing for the specified period. The company's leaders are anticipated to delve into key metrics and insights during the post-earnings call, offering a comprehensive overview of their Q3 performance.

news.headline: Bank OZK reports $177.1 million Q3 earnings, a 4.4% rise from 2023, with $522.1 million in 9-month 2024 earnings.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, on October 17, 2024, Bank OZK disclosed that its net income available to common stockholders in the third quarter of 2024 reached $177.1 million, marking the eighth straight quarterly record. This figure represents a 4.4% surge from the $169.7 million reported in the third quarter of 2023. Over the initial nine months of 2024, the net income available to common stockholders totaled $522.1 million, showing a 3.7% rise from the $503.5 million recorded in the first nine months of 2023. The Bank trades on the Nasdaq under the symbol OZK.

news.headline: Bank OZK released management comments on Q3 & first 9 months of 2024. More details on their website.
news.summary: The management comments for the third quarter and first nine months of 2024 for Bank OZK, listed on Nasdaq as OZK, can now be accessed on the Bank's investor relations website, https://ir.ozk.com. This information was released from Little Rock, Arkansas on October 17, 2024.

news.summary: Cohu, Inc. (NASDAQ: COHU), a worldwide provider of equipment and solutions that enhance semiconductor manufacturing efficiency, is set to unveil its third-quarter financial outcomes on October 31, 2024, at 1:00 p.m. PT/4:00 p.m. ET. Those interested can tune in to the live webcast for insights.

news.headline: WillScot (Nasdaq: WSC) to report Q3 2024 results on Oct 30, 2024, after market close - announced on Oct 17, 2024.

(NASDAQ: TTD), is set to report its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, November 7th after the market closes. news.headline: Cirrus Logic to post Q2 fiscal year 2025 results on Nov 4 at 4 pm EST, with live Q&A at 5 pm EST. Replay available online.

news.headline: Amazon.com will webcast Q3 2024 results conference call on Oct 31, 2024 at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET.

The call, which will be webcast live on their website, is expected to provide insights into the company's performance and future outlook. The audio recording and presentation slides from the call will be accessible on www.amazon.com/ir for up to three months following the event.

news.headline: Pathways to Healing faces $390,000 cut in VOCA funding, seeks community support for sexual assault survivors.
news.summary: In Columbia, South Carolina on October 17, 2024, Pathways to Healing, a prominent nonprofit organization aiding sexual assault survivors in the Midlands, stated a noteworthy decrease in their financial assistance from the Victims of Crime Act (VOCA). The organization faced a substantial reduction of $390,000, leading to significant challenges in their operations...

news.headline: Yen weakens as Bank of Japan remains hesitant.
Getac partners with Veritone to offer AI-powered software for redaction in body-worn cameras, streamlining process.
news.summary: In Denver, Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI), known for human-centered enterprise AI solutions, shared that Getac Technology Corporation, a key player in rugged computing and mobile video solutions, will now provide their customers with Veritone Redact. This AI-driven software aims to simplify the redaction process for various types of camera footage including body-worn, in-car, interview room, and transport cameras. Through this collaboration, Getac incorporates Veritone Redact into its Evidence Management suite for seamless operations.

news.headline: ConceiveAbilities introduces Enhanced Surrogate Care & Compensation Package for 2024, providing top support, coverage, and pay.
news.summary: A surrogacy agency based in Chicago, announced on October 17, 2024, the launch of an enhanced care and compensation package for surrogates. With almost 30 years of experience, ConceiveAbilities is offering the Enhanced All-In Surrogate Care and Compensation Package for 2024, aiming to set a higher benchmark in the surrogacy field. This new package is designed to empower surrogates and provide comprehensive support, including increased financial benefits and additional services.

news.headline: Over half of Americans (56%) targeted with election scams, younger voters under 35 most vulnerable to fake polls, donation scams, and disinformation.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Norton discovered that individuals under the age of 35 are the primary targets for fake polls, fraudulent donation schemes, and disinformation campaigns. This information was released from locations in Tempe, Arizona, and Prague on October 17, 2024. The survey revealed that a significant 56% of Americans have been affected by these deceptive tactics with less than three weeks remaining before the upcoming U.S. Election Day.

news.headline: Investors in OpenSea NFTs urged to contact Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC for potential claims, investigation ongoing.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC announced an investigation on behalf of individuals who bought OpenSea NFTs. Purchasers of OpenSea NFTs are urged to participate in the probe and gather more details. If you purchased OpenSea NFTs, you may be eligible to make a claim.

news.headline: Alkermes plc (Nasdaq: ALKS) will discuss third quarter financial results on Oct. 24, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Dublin-based pharmaceutical company Alkermes plc, listed on Nasdaq as ALKS, is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast presentation on Thursday, Oct. 24, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. ET (1:00 p.m. BST). The purpose of the event is to review the company's financial performance for the third quarter. The presentation will be made available through a webcast player along with accompanying slides.

news.headline: Smithfield Foods and United Supermarkets donate 15 tons (30,000 pounds) of pork products to South Plains Food Bank in Texas.
news.summary: In Smithfield, Virginia on October 17, 2024, Smithfield Foods collaborated with United Supermarkets to give over 30,000 pounds of pork products to South Plains Food Bank in Lubbock, Texas. This donation aims to offer crucial protein to West Texans facing food insecurity.

Escalade, Inc. (NASDAQ: ESCA) announced to issue third quarter 2024 results before market opens.

The company, listed as ESCA on NASDAQ, is widely recognized for its diverse range of indoor and outdoor products.

news.headline: Global commercial air conditioner market to grow by USD 46.28 billion 2024-2028, at CAGR of over 6.3%, driven by demand for energy-efficient solutions, AI insights - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report on the impact of artificial intelligence on market dynamics, it was revealed that the Global Commercial Air Conditioner Market is projected to witness significant growth. Estimates suggest that the market will expand by approximately USD 46.28 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 6.3%. This growth is indicative of the transformative influence of AI on various sectors, including the commercial air conditioner market.

news.headline: Article compares value of CAE (NYSE: CAE) & Teledyne Technologies (NYSE: TDY) for investors. Both have Zacks Rank of #2.

One approach is to consider a strong Zacks Rank and a high grade in the Value category of the Style Scores system. Both CAE and Teledyne Technologies currently hold a Zacks Rank of #2. Further analysis can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: BWH provides nurses with illegal health insurance plan, facing tax penalties after agreement to avoid strike.
news.summary: Brigham and Women's Hospital (BWH) recently shortened its health insurance enrollment period, causing delays in providing crucial information to nurses. This has left nurses in a difficult position, as they may incur significant tax penalties if they opt for the MNA insurance plan. The decision has particularly impacted registered nurses at BWH, who are now grappling with the possibility of facing financial consequences due to the delayed communication and limited enrollment window. This situation has created added pressure for nurses as they navigate their health insurance options.

news.headline: Fluid Truck filed for Chapter 11 to facilitate a sale, continuing normal operations to serve customers.
news.summary: Fluid Truck, a prominent tech-enabled flexible fleet rental company, has confirmed ongoing operations without disruption to assist customers despite filing for Chapter 11 protection on October 17, 2024. The company continues to serve customers and provide support seamlessly.

news.headline: Family of Jahxy Peets plans press conference on Oct 21, 2024, after Orlando Health admits to breaking newborn's neck.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, on October 17, 2024, the relatives of Jahxy Peets have arranged a press briefing scheduled for Monday, October 21, 2024, at 3:30 pm. The event will take place outside Orlando Health Winnie Palmer Hospital for Women & Babies. The family seeks accountability from the hospital chain, claiming...

news.headline: New Mexico CC introduces Viva Vino Red Winemaking Bootcamp - 2 weeks, 40 hours/week, for winemaking professionals.
news.summary: Immerse yourself in the world of red wine production with the Viva Vino Red Winemaking Bootcamp, a comprehensive program that covers all facets of red wine making. This two-week bootcamp consists of 40 hours per week, providing participants with a deep dive into the intricacies of the winemaking process. Designed for current and future professionals in the industry, the program aims to empower individuals to achieve greater success in their winemaking endeavors. The bootcamp will take place in Albuquerque, N.M., starting on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Caroline Blanck launches Mandy to empower women in the tool industry; redefining a male-dominated sector.
news.summary: In SAG HARBOR, N.Y., on October 17, 2024, Caroline Blanck introduced Mandy, a new brand aiming to empower women in DIY projects. Blanck's vision is to challenge the male-dominated tool industry by providing tools tailored for women. The launch showcases her belief that all women can embrace DIY tasks with the appropriate equipment. Mandy's debut signifies a step towards inclusivity in a traditionally male-oriented sector.

news.headline: Galactic Civilizations IV to release "Megastructures" expansion on Dec 12, 2024, promising colossal structures to enhance gameplay.
news.summary: Stardock is set to revolutionize Galactic Civilizations IV with the upcoming release of the "Megastructures" expansion on December 12, 2024. This expansion introduces colossal structures that promise to transform gameplay. Located in PLYMOUTH, Mich., the announcement on Oct. 17, 2024, has generated excitement among players eager to explore new strategies and galactic frontiers. This expansion is expected to reshape empires and redefine exploration in the game, offering a fresh experience to players. So mark your calendars for December 12, 2024, for a game-changing update to Galactic Civilizations IV.

news.headline: Casa Munras Garden Hotel & Spa celebrates 200 years of hospitality in Monterey with 250 people in attendance.
news.summary: In Monterey, California on October 17, 2024, the Casa Munras Garden Hotel & Spa marked its 200th anniversary. On September 21, 2024, more than 250 individuals participated in the celebratory gathering, highlighting the establishment's long-standing hospitality. The event honored Casa Munras's illustrious past and commended its enduring legacy and traditions.

news.headline: Poll by Education Forward Arizona reveals Arizonans demand higher education access & affordability. Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, a new poll was released by Education Forward Arizona as a part of the Everything to Gain initiative in Phoenix. The poll is part of a continuous study focusing on education and training attainment post-high school. Findings indicate strong support from Arizona residents, highlighting the importance of further education and training opportunities.

news.headline: Joe Boyle, UPS Corporate Transportation President, appointed to ATRI Board of Directors by Chairman Derek Leathers.
news.summary: In an announcement made on October 17, 2024, the American Transportation Research Institute (ATRI) revealed the selection of Joe Boyle, the President of UPS Corporate Transportation, to join its Board of Directors. This appointment came from ATRI Chairman of the Board Derek Leathers from Werner.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Yellen: China doesn't need one-off checks to boost spending, consensus urges China to boost the consumer share of income.
Strong retail sales challenge Dec. Fed rate cut, S&P 500 fades despite opening higher.
news.summary: Last month, retail sales exceeded expectations, leading to speculation about the possibility of a Fed rate cut in December. The S&P 500 started the day with gains but eventually declined. This strong performance in retail sales may influence the decision on a December Fed rate cut.

news.headline: Manifest launches new self-empowerment wellness app, raises $3.4M from various funds to support Gen Z with self-care.
news.summary: A recent app has secured $3.4 million in funding from various investors including a16z Speedrun, HF0, Florida Funders, Soma Capital, Stand Together Ventures Lab, Transpose Platform, 305 Ventures, and Mack Ventures. The app aims to provide Gen Z with a platform to actively address their concerns and establish daily routines focused on self-care. This initiative is based in New York and was announced on Oct. 17th.
